answers: Software testing ensures your code works correctly. Types: unit testing (individual functions), integration testing (components together), and E2E testing (full user flow).
Unit testing: test one function at a time. Use pytest (Python), Jest (JavaScript), JUnit (Java). Write test first (TDD) or after code - just write them!
Testing tip: aim for good coverage on critical paths, not 100% coverage everywhere. Test edge cases, error handling, and the happy path.
QA basics: manual testing (exploratory, regression) + automated testing (Selenium, Cypress, Playwright). Automation saves time for repeated test cases.
